description: Agent Scenario 1: Staple product, no inducement — expected: s117 detected, unlikely_infringement
case_summary: Patent holder alleges that a hardware supplier is contributing to infringement by selling generic metal clips that could be used with the patented panel fastening system. The supplier is a general hardware retailer with no knowledge of the patent.

patent_context.patent_title: Improved fastening mechanism for modular panels
patent_context.claim_description: A method of fastening modular panels using a specific clip arrangement

product.product_description: Generic metal clips sold at hardware stores for general fastening purposes
product.staple_reasoning: Metal clips are a widely available commodity product with many non-infringing uses

supplier_conduct.reason_to_believe_details: Supplier sells general hardware products and has no specific knowledge of the patent

evidence.evidence_notes: No evidence of any supplier conduct directed toward patent infringement
